manifest.description: Bidirectional LINE Messaging API integration for Paperclip: verified webhook intake, agent sessions per LINE user, outbound LINE push tools, and inbound media relay.
manifest.author: Bandruption

lineChannelSecretRef.title: LINE Channel Secret (secret reference)
lineChannelSecretRef.description: Secret UUID for the LINE Messaging API channel secret used to verify webhook signatures.

lineChannelAccessTokenRef.title: LINE Channel Access Token (secret reference)
lineChannelAccessTokenRef.description: Secret UUID for the LINE channel access token used by outbound LINE API calls.

paperclipBoardApiKeyRef.title: Paperclip Board API Key (secret reference)
paperclipBoardApiKeyRef.description: Optional secret UUID for a board API key used by attachment uploads in authenticated deployments.

paperclipApiBaseUrl.title: Paperclip API Base URL
paperclipApiBaseUrl.description: Optional override for the Paperclip API base URL. Defaults to the PAPERCLIP_API_URL env var.

defaultPaperclipCompany.title: Default Paperclip Company
defaultPaperclipCompany.description: Single-tenant mode: the Paperclip company every inbound LINE user is mapped to. Leave blank if you supply an onProvisionPrincipal extension hook.

defaultAgentId.title: Default Agent ID
defaultAgentId.description: Single-tenant mode: the agent that handles every LINE user's session. Leave blank if you supply an onProvisionPrincipal extension hook.

attachmentBucketName.title: Attachment Bucket Name
attachmentBucketName.description: Logical attachment bucket namespace used for inbound LINE media object keys.

attachmentSignedUrlTtlDays.title: Attachment Signed URL TTL (days)
attachmentSignedUrlTtlDays.description: Number of days inbound LINE attachment signed read URLs remain valid.

idleCloseMinutes.title: Idle Close Threshold (minutes)
idleCloseMinutes.description: How long an open LINE thread may stay idle before the plugin closes it.

linePushDailyLimit.title: LINE Push Daily Limit
linePushDailyLimit.description: Maximum line.push_* tool calls per Paperclip company and agent per UTC day. Use 0 to disable push tools.

replyTokenMaxAgeSeconds.title: Reply Token Max Age (seconds)
replyTokenMaxAgeSeconds.description: Maximum age for cached LINE reply tokens before they are treated as expired.

jobs.description: Queue-drain job that processes verified inbound LINE events after the webhook ACK path returns.
Scheduled sweep that closes stale LINE threads and tears down their persisted agent sessions.
Scheduled cleanup for expired cached LINE reply-token metadata.

webhooks.description: Receives LINE Messaging API webhook deliveries for inbound LINE traffic.

tools.name: line.push_text
tools.description: Send a plain-text LINE push message to a mapped LINE principal.

tools.name: line.push_image
tools.description: Send an image to a LINE principal using a publicly readable or signed image URL.

tools.name: line.push_flex
tools.description: Send a LINE Flex message payload to a LINE principal.

tools.name: line.push_template
tools.description: Send a LINE template message payload to a LINE principal.

tools.name: line.push_sticker
tools.description: Send a sticker message to a LINE principal.

tools.name: line.ack_with_reply_token
tools.description: Use cached reply-token metadata tied to a Paperclip comment to send an immediate acknowledgment.

tools.name: line.close_thread
tools.description: Close the current Paperclip thread for a mapped LINE user.

tools.name: line.get_profile
tools.description: Fetch the current LINE profile data for a mapped LINE principal.
